title: Manufacturing Engineer - Emami Digital Technologies - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Emami Digital Technologies - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
We at Emami Digital Technologies are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Gurgaon. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Emami Digital Technologies:
Emami Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Emami Digital Technologies!
